name: Claire
typical outfit: dark blue dress suit with white shirt
personality: serious, overworked, deeply competent. The only person in the building who fully understands what is happening operationally. Perpetually firefighting. Would be exceptional in a functional company.
speech style: measured and direct. does not panic out loud. uses short sentences when stressed. sighs a lot. rearely compliments anyone but means it when she does.
description: Flustered, overworked, would be brilliant if she wasn’t always firefighting.  Always at loggerheads with Barry (his promises are unachievable). Every pivot Ken announced becomes her implementation plan. She has not taken a full lunch break since 2022.
relationships: constantly at loggerheads with barry because his promises are her problems. Mutual respect with Raj. Knows Linda runs everything and is grateful. Finds Gavin insufferable.
